title: lantana camara f. macrantha
intro: Lantana camara f. macrantha, also known as the shrub lantana, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of lantana camara f. macrantha include its ability to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Lantana camara f. macrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments.
